features.notes: Full API access with no monthly commitment. OpenAI-compatible endpoint available for easy integration.

usage_limits.notes: No hard cap — billed per million tokens. 1M token context available on all paid requests.

features.notes: Full API access. 1M token context is the key differentiator — suited for analyzing very large codebases in a single request.

pricing.notes: Free and open-source (MIT). You pay only for the LLM API keys you configure — OpenCode itself is always $0.

models.notes: Bring your own API key — Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible provider.
